creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for confirming that the pcib1 window errors are unrelated.

I've tried 2 SATA adapter cards - the 2-port JMB585 in my original report as well as a ASMedia ASM1166.  Both report "AHCI controller reset failure" on the Quartz64 though they work correctly on an amd64 system (admittedly, running FreeBSD 13.0, rather than 15.0).  I will investigate further now I have a better pointer to the problem area.
